articles.adaptedFrom: AP News (via NPR World News, June 17, 2026)
articles.title: UN Chief Travels to Haiti as Thousands Are Killed by Gang Violence
articles.summary: The head of the United Nations, António Guterres, travelled to Haiti's capital, Port-au-Prince, on June 16 to see the situation on the ground for himself. Haiti has been suffering from serious gang violence for a long time. According to United Nations figures, around 2,300 people have already lost their lives in Haiti so far this year, and at least 100 others have been kidnapped. Guterres met with soldiers and local people during his visit. The UN is trying to find ways to bring peace and safety back to the Caribbean nation, where many citizens live in fear every day.

lv1: Who is the leader of the United Nations who visited Haiti? (聯合國的領導人是誰去了海地探訪？)
According to the UN, how many people have been killed in Haiti this year? (根據聯合國的資料，今年海地有多少人喪生？)
lv2: Why do you think the UN Secretary-General decided to visit Haiti in person instead of just sending a message? (你認為聯合國秘書長為何親自前往海地，而不只是發出訊息？)
How might gang violence affect the daily lives of children living in Haiti? (幫派暴力可能如何影響住在海地的兒童的日常生活？)
lv3: What responsibilities do international organisations like the UN have when a country is facing violence and instability? Should they intervene, and if so, how? (當一個國家面臨暴力和動盪時，聯合國等國際組織有什麼責任？他們應否介入，如何介入？)

Some people argue that other countries should not get involved in Haiti's internal problems, while others believe the world must help. What is your view, and why? (有人認為其他國家不應干涉海地的內部問題，也有人認為世界各國必須伸出援手。你的看法是什麼？原因為何？)

articles.title: Top Beijing Official Ends Two-Day Hong Kong Visit, Urging Faster Development of Northern Metropolis
articles.summary: Xia Baolong, the director of China's Hong Kong and Macao Affairs Office, finished a two-day visit to Hong Kong on Wednesday, June 17, and left the city through the Shenzhen Bay crossing. During his stay, he inspected the Northern Metropolis development zone and encouraged officials to speed up construction and innovation work there. Hong Kong's Chief Executive, John Lee, saw him off and spoke to reporters afterwards. Officials said the visit showed that the central government considers the Northern Metropolis an important engine for Hong Kong's future growth in technology and industry.

lv1: Which part of Hong Kong did the Beijing official visit during his two-day trip? (這位北京官員在兩天的訪問中參觀了香港哪個地區？)
How did the official leave Hong Kong after his visit? (這位官員在訪問結束後是如何離開香港的？)
lv2: Why might the Chinese central government be especially interested in the development of the Northern Metropolis area? (中央政府為何特別關注北部都會區的發展？)
What does it mean to develop a city as a centre for 'innovation and technology'? Can you give some examples? (把一個城市發展成「創新科技」中心是什麼意思？你能舉出一些例子嗎？)
lv3: The Northern Metropolis is planned to bring Hong Kong and the mainland cities of the Greater Bay Area closer together. Do you think this is a good idea for Hong Kong's future? What are the possible benefits and concerns? (北部都會區的規劃旨在拉近香港與大灣區內地城市的距離。你認為這對香港的未來是好事嗎？有什麼可能的好處和隱憂？)
When a senior official visits a city to inspect development projects, how can ordinary citizens make sure their voices are also heard in planning decisions? (當高級官員視察發展項目時，普通市民如何確保自己的聲音也能在規劃決策中被聽到？)

articles.title: 港府公務員獲加薪2%　工會憂中低層加幅創十年新低
articles.summary: 香港政府宣布，公務員將獲加薪2%，調整將考慮政府未來的財務負擔。不過，有公務員工會對此表示關注，認為若引入新的計算方式，中低層公務員的加薪幅度可能是近十年來最低的一次。工會擔心新機制欠缺透明度，難以讓員工清楚了解薪酬調整的依據。公務員薪酬水平直接影響數以萬計在政府部門工作的僱員，加薪幅度亦反映政府對公共財政的取態。

lv1: 香港政府宣布公務員加薪多少百分比？
哪些人對今次加薪幅度感到不滿？
lv2: 為什麼公務員工會會擔心新的薪酬計算方式？這對中低層員工有什麼影響？
政府在決定公務員加薪幅度時，需要考慮哪些因素？
lv3: 有人認為政府應該優先保障公共財政穩健，因此不宜大幅加薪；也有人認為公務員為市民服務，理應獲得合理薪酬。你認為哪個觀點更有說服力？
薪酬透明度對員工和僱主雙方有什麼好處和壞處？政府機構是否應該公開所有薪酬計算細節？

articles.title: 青沙公路發生奪命車禍　休班消防員補渡蜜月返港途中不幸罹難
articles.summary: 青沙公路於6月17日發生嚴重交通意外，造成兩人死亡。其中一名男死者是一名休班消防員，他與太太補渡蜜月後返港，途中遭遇意外，不幸離世。據悉，該消防員上星期曾參與觀塘海面的拯救行動，救起一名墮海長者，獲得市民讚揚。事件令人惋惜，各界對其家屬表示深切慰問。當局正就事故展開調查，了解車禍成因。

lv1: 這宗車禍發生在哪條公路上？
其中一名死者生前是從事什麼職業的？
lv2: 為什麼這宗交通意外特別令人感到惋惜？請從新聞內容中找出原因。
消防員在社會上擔當什麼重要角色？他們的工作有哪些危險？
lv3: 香港道路交通事故時有發生，你認為政府和市民各自可以採取什麼措施來減少意外？
當一名為社會服務的人（如消防員、醫護人員）不幸離世，社會應如何支援其家屬？這反映了社會對公共服務人員有什麼態度？
